hero.tagline: Africa does not need heroines. It needs systems. I build the systems.

bio.title: Diane NDEUNA, Organizational Systems Architect
bio.summary: I transform meaningful engagement into autonomous systems capable of dialoguing with institutions.

badges.movement: Permanent Secretary of the Cameroon Entrepreneurs Movement

bio.paragraph1: For over twenty years, Diane NDEUNA has supported the structuring of women's organizations across francophone Africa, combining methodological rigor with a deep understanding of local institutional realities.
bio.paragraph2: Her intercontinental experience, spanning Africa, Europe and the United States, fuels an approach that is both demanding and deeply rooted in the African contexts she serves.

foundation.title: Training and early engagement
foundation.description: Building solid expertise in organizational structuring and governance, in direct contact with African women's organizations.

eden.title: Executive President of EDEN AFRICA
eden.description: Leading a pan-African impact organization, active for 14 years across 15 countries, accredited by the OIF.

international.title: Intercontinental experience
international.description: Deploying her expertise across Africa, Europe and the United States, serving an expanded institutional network.

recognition.title: Chairing COING Francophonie 2024-2025
recognition.description: Institutional recognition leading 128 organizations within the COING Francophonie.

governance.title: Governance capacity building
governance.description: Supporting decision-making bodies toward structured, high-performing governance.

financing.title: Access to financing
financing.description: Resource mobilization and support toward international financing.

advocacy.title: Advocacy and representation
advocacy.description: Institutional representation serving the visibility of women's organizations.

networks.title: Network building
networks.description: Connecting organizations with a strategic partner ecosystem.

medias.title: Digital and media presence
medias.description: Diane NDEUNA regularly appears in the media and at institutional events to champion the voice of African women's organizations.

index.title: Four areas of intervention
index.description: Structured support built around four complementary pillars, dedicated to the sustainability of women's organizations in Africa.

structuration.title: Structuring Women's Organizations
structuration.description: Organizational diagnostics, strategic planning and governance for lasting organizations.
structuration.longDescription: Comprehensive support to turn engagement into solid organizations, able to dialogue with institutions and stand the test of time.
services: Support for accreditation with international bodies

developpement.title: Women's Project Development
developpement.description: From design to deployment, including structuring and financing.
developpement.longDescription: A structured four-phase approach to turn an idea into a funded, operational project, across key sectors of African development.

formation.title: Training & Coaching
formation.description: Institutional leadership, project management and resource mobilization.
formation.longDescription: Training and individualized support to strengthen the skills of women leaders at every stage of their journey.

conseil.title: Strategic Advisory & Support
conseil.description: Institutional support, networking and international compliance.
conseil.longDescription: High-level strategic support to structure vision, strengthen institutional positioning and prepare access to international financing.

diagnostic.title: Is your organization ready for international financing?
diagnostic.introDescription: This quick assessment gives you an initial estimate of your institutional readiness, in under two minutes.

governance.label: How would you rate your organization's governance?

financials.label: What is the state of your financial and accounting management?

network.label: What is your level of institutional networking?

reporting.label: Does your organization produce regular activity reports?

options.3: Structured, regular reporting aligned with international standards

diagnostic.contactDescription: Share your details to access your score and receive personalized recommendations.
diagnostic.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

NOT_READY.title: Foundation stage
NOT_READY.description: Your organization needs structuring support before pursuing international financing. Diane NDEUNA can guide you through this essential first step.

IN_PROGRESS.title: Structuring in progress
IN_PROGRESS.description: Foundations are in place, but key areas still need strengthening. Targeted support can accelerate your readiness.

READY.title: Solid readiness level
READY.description: Your organization shows solid foundations. Strategic support can help you reach the final milestones toward international financing.

EXCELLENT.title: Excellent institutional readiness
EXCELLENT.description: Your organization is highly mature. You are ready to pursue international financing with strategic positioning support.

index.title: Four entities, one vision
index.description: An integrated ecosystem of complementary organizations, dedicated to structuring and empowering African women.

detail.brochureUnavailable: The brochure is not yet available. Please check back soon.

adef.name: ADEF
adef.description: Incubation, acceleration and market access for African entrepreneurs.
adef.longDescription: ADEF supports African women entrepreneurs through incubation, acceleration, investor matchmaking and market access, via targeted sectoral programs and dedicated events.

eden.name: EDEN AFRICA
eden.description: Pan-African impact organization active across 15 countries.
eden.longDescription: EDEN AFRICA is a pan-African impact organization active for 14 years across 15 countries, accredited by the OIF, and chairs the COING Francophonie 2024-2025 gathering 128 organizations.

mia.name: MIA AFRICA
mia.description: Platform dedicated to women in artificial intelligence.
mia.longDescription: MIA AFRICA — MAMIZA Artificial Intelligence — addresses women's underrepresentation in artificial intelligence through training, mentorship and visibility spaces.
mia.stat: of AI professionals worldwide are women

oscf.name: OSCF
oscf.longDescription: OSCF is an international platform analyzing civic dynamics, producing studies, data and reports on francophone civil society.
